blocking_issues.description: Regression tests are source-inspection only and do not satisfy plan criteria requiring fail-before-fix/pass-after-fix behavioral tests for center/edge/corner positions with point set validation.
blocking_issues.root_cause: FBattleBoard inherits from wxScrolledWindow and cannot be instantiated without a wxApp. No GUI-independent test seam exists.

follow_up_requests: Extract clamp/range computation into a GUI-independent helper to enable behavioral unit testing
Add behavioral regression tests for center, edge, corner positions asserting all returned hexes satisfy 0 <= x < m_nCol and 0 <= y < m_nRow
